title: Ok Zoomer - It's Zoom!
description: Ok Zoomer is a zoom mod that is powerful, lean, and pretty customizable. The zoom is yours!
body:
![Banner for the Ok Zoomer mod](https://mod-assets.upcraft.dev/promo/ok-zoomer/modpage_banner.png)
What you are seeing here is the best zoom mod around here. It is faster than those who claim to be simple, it is lighter than bloated competitors with megabytes of dependencies, it is powerful with its configurability and its many presets, and most importantly, it is never afraid to innovate, having popularized zoom transitions on its release and always introducing new features. The zoom key is bound to C by default, with the zoom itself prioritizing a smooth transition between the user's interface and a clean view, which is perfect for screenshots! But if you want something else? We have options! By going to Mod Menu or by using the `/ok_zoomer` command, you can choose other presets such as "Competitive" (prioritizes your interface), "Classic" (emulates OptiFine's zoom), Spyglass, and others! You can also tweak other options such as Zoom Transition, Cinematic Camera, Zoom Divisor, and much more! You can see more information on the options on the [wiki](https://github.com/Up-Mods/OkZoomer/wiki/Configuration). ## Dependencies As of 1.20.6, this mod requires only the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to be installed. As for the loader, the Fabric Loader, as well as the [Quilt Loader](https://quiltmc.org), are available. As of Ok Zoomer 10.0.0, this mod is fully compatible with NeoForge with no extra dependencies. [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is optional but it might be a more convenient way to access the config screen. For the best experience on Minecraft 26.1, check out [Longview](https://modrinth.com/mod/longview)! ## Attribution This mod's icon makes usage of [Twemoji](https://github.com/jdecked/twemoji) assets, which are licensed under [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
